title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Trace Retrieval
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a defended multi-structure dispatch system after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate operation frequency, scale, latency, memory, and consistency needs into structure criteria.
Combine structures while documenting duplicated state and synchronization invariants.
Present loop invariants, induction, or contradiction arguments appropriate to each component.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Workload Analysis correctness-and-cost proof for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Workload Analysis assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Solve a bounded review instance with 8 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Workload Analysis has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

stimulus.title: Design Defense case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Solve a bounded review instance with 9 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Fast benchmark results alone justify the design.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend alternatives, limitations, failure recovery, and measured tradeoffs to reviewers. Artifact under review: a defended multi-structure dispatch system.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Design Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Optimize from one happy-path timing, without defining input size, invariant, or an adversarial case for Design Defense.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Design Defense: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Solve a bounded review instance with 5 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend alternatives, limitations, failure recovery, and measured tradeoffs to reviewers.
